name: Asset Servicing Corporate Actions
description: Returns upcoming corporate actions such as dividends, splits, and elections pending for a given relationship. Accepts relationship_id as the primary key. Accessed via MCP tool over Streamable HTTP transport.

skills.name: get_corporate_actions
skills.description: Retrieve upcoming corporate actions including dividends, splits, and elections due for a given asset servicing relationship.
examples: any dividends or splits coming up
corporate action calendar for the relationship
corporate action calendar for the Whitman relationship
corporate actions summary for this relationship
any corporate action activity I should know about on this account
